Vendored third-party libraries shipped with Phosphene's webapp/ frontend.
Downloaded once at migration time (no build tooling, no CDN at runtime).

==============================================================================
marked v12.0.2 — markdown parser
  Source:  https://github.com/markedjs/marked
  CDN:     https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/marked@12/marked.min.js
  License: MIT
==============================================================================

DOMPurify 3.4.2 — XSS sanitizer
  Source:  https://github.com/cure53/DOMPurify
  CDN:     https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/dompurify@3/dist/purify.min.js
  License: dual — Apache License 2.0 OR Mozilla Public License 2.0
==============================================================================

DOMPurify (c) Cure53 and other contributors. Released under the Apache
License Version 2.0 and Mozilla Public License Version 2.0.

Full license text:
  Apache 2.0: https://github.com/cure53/DOMPurify/blob/main/LICENSE (Apache section)
  MPL 2.0:    https://github.com/cure53/DOMPurify/blob/main/LICENSE (MPL section)

The license text is also embedded in the file's leading comment. See
purify.min.js for the in-file license header.
